title: Pharmacy Services Mission and Vision
content:
Pharmacy Services Mission and Vision

Our Mission

Based on the principles of our university, on the axis of continuous change and development brought by the information society, with the knowledge, skills and responsibility awareness required by the Pharmacy Services program, it is aimed to ensure that qualified individuals who follow scientific developments closely, are innovative, are prone to teamwork in the protection and promotion of health, and can contribute to their field in hospitals and private pharmacies. to ensure their inclusion in business life.

Our vision

To be an education, training and research institution that is preferred in the health sector in the training of Pharmacy Services technicians, in the production and use of knowledge and skills, that creates awareness in cooperation with stakeholders, contributes to science and social development, plays a leading role in the field of education and training at national and international level and can sustain it. .
